name: youtube-music-cli
title: YouTube Music CLI
description: Control youtube-music-cli from Raycast — play, pause, skip, search, and manage your queue
author: miloszzajac

commands.name: next-track
commands.title: Next Track
commands.description: Skip to the next track in the queue

commands.name: previous-track
commands.title: Previous Track
commands.description: Go back to the previous track

commands.name: toggle-playback
commands.title: Toggle Playback
commands.description: Play or pause the current track

commands.name: controller
commands.title: Player Controller
commands.description: View and control the currently playing track

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search Songs
commands.description: Search YouTube Music and play tracks
